Now, in closing, I want you to remember that the straight line is an exact sequence of how you go from point A to point B from the open to the close. And again, it's driven by your ability to get into conscious and unconscious rapport and maintain that rapport with your prospects by using effective tonality and appropriate body language. Now, remember, you'll find various points along the way that you'll have these little dips in rapport. And the idea is to recognize those dips, slow down, and get yourself back into rapport, and then build that rapport to an even higher level, and then move forward. And also, of course, rapport does not mean going off into Pluto, where you're just taking the conversation away from the straight line. Make sure you review the competencies associated with this module and complete the exercises to put the straight line into action. And as you watch the critical incident scenarios, notice the body language and tonality, and you'll see how by making significant...
